Finance + Data
ACCA Student · Big 4 Target

About Me

Finance meets Technology.

What separates me is not just accounting knowledge — it's the ability to extract, clean, and present financial data with speed and precision that most auditors simply don't have.

I've graduated with a Bachelor's in Accounting & Finance from Foundation University Islamabad and am now pursuing ACCA, building toward a career in external audit at a Big 4 firm. My differentiator is simple: I bring data analytics capabilities that most accounting candidates don't have.

I've invested hundreds of hours mastering Excel at an advanced level — Power Query, Pivot Tables, financial modeling, complex nested formulas. I complement this with SQL for data cleaning, Python for automation, and Power BI for visual financial storytelling.

I believe the future of audit is digital. Technology is transforming how auditors test controls, analyze populations, and detect anomalies. I want to be at the forefront of that shift from day one.

With 50+ certifications from Google, Microsoft, IBM, and Simplilearn — plus micro1 AI Interview certification — I've proven not just the ability to learn, but the discipline to pursue mastery independently.

🎯
Target: Big 4 External Audit
Deloitte, PwC, EY, or KPMG — focused on statutory audit of listed entities in Pakistan and beyond.
📊
Data-First Audit Mindset
Capable of auditing entire populations using data tools, not just samples — reducing risk and increasing coverage.
⚡
120+ Shortcuts · 53 WPM
Excel and Windows shortcuts that translate directly into efficiency in audit documentation and workpapers.
🏆
Certified by micro1 AI Interview
Officially certified as Excel Specialist by micro1 after passing their AI-driven interview — June 2025.

Accounting & Finance Intern — Banking Operations
Askari Bank
  • Gained hands-on experience in live banking operations at one of Pakistan's leading banks — covering financial reconciliation, compliance processes, and regulatory workflows.

  • Gained comprehensive understanding of internal banking workflows, operational controls, and regulatory processes — all directly transferable to external audit of financial institutions.

Proof of Work · Projects

Applied Practice Files.

Real Excel files, SQL projects, and Python scripts built to solve actual finance and audit problems. Hover any card to see what's inside — this is the proof.

Financial Modeling
Financial Modeling, Valuation & Analysis
Comprehensive model covering DCF valuation, sensitivity analysis, and investment decision support.
DCF ValuationSensitivityFinancial Ratios
Hover to explore →
What's Inside
Multi-sheet model: Income Statement, Balance Sheet & Cash Flow projections. DCF engine with WACC inputs. 2-way sensitivity tables on growth rate & margin. Comparable company analysis. Real ratios: ROE, ROA, D/E.
NPV/WACCScenario TablesComparable Cos View on GitHub
Capital Budgeting
Capital Budgeting Analysis
Applied NPV, IRR, Payback Period, and Profitability Index to evaluate competing investment projects.
NPV/IRRPayback PeriodDecision Models
Hover to explore →
What's Inside
3 competing projects evaluated via NPV, IRR, Payback & PI. Dynamic cash-flow tables using Excel NPV, IRR, XIRR functions. Decision comparison matrix showing trade-offs. Applied directly to investment appraisal under IFRS.
XIRRPI IndexCash Flow Modeling View on GitHub
Scenario Planning
What-If Analysis & Scenario Modeling
Multi-scenario models using Goal Seek, Data Tables, and Scenario Manager to stress-test projections.
Goal SeekData TablesScenario Manager
Hover to explore →
What's Inside
1-way & 2-way Data Tables for revenue/cost sensitivity. Goal Seek reverse-engineering target profits. Scenario Manager: Best/Base/Worst cases with visual output charts showing full outcome ranges.
1-way Tables2-way TablesOutcome Charts View on GitHub

VLOOKUP, XLOOKUP & HLOOKUP Mastery
All lookup functions with error handling and nested lookups for audit reconciliation work.
VLOOKUPXLOOKUPIFERROR

Financial Functions
Financial Functions in Excel
PV, FV, PMT, RATE, NPER to model loans, bonds, and investments with full amortization schedules.
PV/FVPMT/RATEBond Pricing

SQL Project
Data Integrity & SQL Data Cleaning
Full SQL project to clean, standardize, and optimize financial transaction data for audit readiness.
SQLData CleaningData Integrity

Duplicate removal using ROW_NUMBER(). Date format standardization & NULL handling. String cleaning for supplier names & account codes. Index optimization for faster queries. Final dataset validated for completeness.
